title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Contract Workshop
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an extensible resource type hierarchy while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.
Override methods while preserving input, output, state, exception, and side-effect expectations of callers.
Use zero-argument super for cooperative method chains and pass compatible arguments through participating classes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
